---
title: "Quality Reports"
---

Auto-generated quality summaries for every `(form, tax_year)` combination
processed by the pipeline. Each report covers row/column counts, NA rates,
schema vs. crosswalk drift, and any assertion failures from Phase 5.

Reports are produced by `R/07_render_report.R` after the validation phase
and published alongside this book to GitHub Pages.

```{r index, echo=FALSE, results="asis", message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(data.table)
})

reports_dir <- "quality-reports"
if (!dir.exists(reports_dir)) {
  cat("_No quality reports have been rendered yet._\n")
} else {
  files <- list.files(reports_dir, pattern = "_quality\\.html$", recursive = TRUE)
  if (length(files) == 0L) {
    cat("_No quality reports have been rendered yet._\n")
  } else {
    dt <- data.table(file = files)
    # Path format: {tax_year}/{form}/core_{year}_{form}_quality.html
    dt[, c("tax_year", "form") := tstrsplit(file, "/", keep = 1:2)]
    dt[, tax_year := as.integer(tax_year)]
    setorder(dt, form, -tax_year)

    cat(sprintf("Total reports: **%d** across **%d** form(s).\n\n",
                nrow(dt), uniqueN(dt$form)))

    for (f in sort(unique(dt$form))) {
      cat(sprintf("## %s\n\n", f))
      sub <- dt[form == f]
      cat(paste0("- [", sub$tax_year, "](", reports_dir, "/", sub$file, ")",
                 collapse = "\n"), "\n\n")
    }
  }
}
```
